title: vicia angustifolia f. hortensis
intro: Vicia angustifolia f. hortensis, also known as the Narrowleaf Vetch, is a flowering plant that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the body from damage. The health benefits of Vicia angustifolia f. hortensis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support digestive health. Vicia angustifolia f. hortensis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
